nasb.text: But Amaziah would not listen, for it was from God, that He might deliver them into the hand of Joash because they had sought the gods of Edom.

esv.text: But Amaziah would not listen, for it was of God, in order that he might give them into the hand of their enemies, because they had sought the gods of Edom.

cnv.text: 亞瑪謝卻不聽從；這原是出於　神，好把他們交在約阿施手裡，因為他們尋求以東的神。

ccb.text: 但亚玛谢不理会他的劝告。原来这事出于上帝，要把他们交在约阿施手中，因为他们求告以东的神明。
